name: /agent-verify exits two when the supplied diff file is empty per the F-3 usage contract (nothing to verify)
command: : > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\necho "verdict: agree"\n' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'empty diff' err.txt && echo usage 1>&2
